scripts.build: bun run build:ts && bun run build:py
scripts.build:ts: bun run --filter @rtrq/client-core build && bun run --filter @rtrq/react-query build
scripts.typecheck: bun run --filter @rtrq/client-core typecheck && bun run --filter @rtrq/react-query typecheck
scripts.clean: rm -rf node_modules bun.lock dist packages/clients/core/dist packages/clients/core/*.tsbuildinfo packages/clients/adapters/*/dist packages/clients/adapters/*/*.tsbuildinfo apps/server/dist packages/server-sdks/python/dist
